name: superlooper
description: The superlooper marketplace: one pure-content plugin distributing the issue-loop workflow skills.

plugins.name: superlooper
plugins.description: The universal issue-loop workflow, as pure-content skills. Agents write GitHub issues, William approves by his word, a deterministic runner builds each in a fresh session, a mechanical per-PR gate merges to the dev mainline. The executable engine and the dashboard install separately through the gated source repo — never through this plugin.
